name: Essay Assignment Rubric
description: General rubric for evaluating written essays and assignments

criteria.name: Clarity & Organization
criteria.description: How well is the work organized? Are ideas presented clearly and logically?

levels.2: Some organization but may be unclear
levels.5: Excellent organization, easy to follow throughout

criteria.name: Content & Accuracy
criteria.description: Is the content accurate, relevant, and well-explained?

levels.2: Some accurate content mixed with errors
levels.5: Highly accurate with excellent, detailed explanations

criteria.name: Use of Examples
criteria.description: Does the work include specific examples or evidence to support claims?

levels.2: Good examples that support most claims

criteria.name: Language & Mechanics
criteria.description: Is the writing clear? Are there spelling/grammar errors?

levels.2: Clear writing with few or no errors
